title: Magical Springy Russian Pork Knuckle Wrap
description: A funky and quick Russian dish featuring pork knuckle, served in a ssam wrap style, jain friendly
instructions: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius
In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, maple syrup, rice vinegar, garlic, and ginger
Add the pork knuckle to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes
Remove the pork knuckle from the marinade and place it in the oven
Bake the pork knuckle for 2 hours or until it reaches an internal temperature of 85 degrees Celsius
While the pork is cooking, prepare the ssam wrap by slicing it into individual pieces
Once the pork is done, let it rest for 10 minutes before slicing it thinly
Assemble the wrap by placing a few slices of the pork onto a ssam wrap piece, followed by some pickled vegetables and cilantro
